chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Civil Revision No.S-161 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on C.M.A.No.105/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 15.09.2025 None present. ------ None present on behalf of the applicant. Record reflects that the applicant has submitted a Statement for withdrawal of present Civil Revision Application, which in view of such statement is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn alongwith the pending application with no order as to costs. Judge Manzoor
